title: Spicy Shrimp Stir Fry
description: A Thai-inspired stir-fry with succulent shrimp, tangy flavors, and a kick of spice.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced Slovakian and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add fish sauce, soy sauce, and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in chopped icy lettuce leaves and cook until wilted, about 1 minute.
Garnish with additional chopped icy lettuce, if desired.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables, if desired.
